channel.title: LLM Timeline — Arcee AI Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Arcee AI.

item.title: Trinity-Large (Arcee AI)
item.description: Parameters: Trinity-Large License: open Type: model 400BA13B. "we worked closely with Prime Intellect. They not only served the H100 clusters Datology used to generate synthetic data, they have been deeply involved in helping scale our training setup to the GPU footprint required for a fully frontier sized model, including the current 2048 B300 GPU configuration for Trinity Large."

item.title: Trinity-Mini (Arcee AI)
item.description: Parameters: Trinity-Mini License: open Type: model 26BA3B. "we worked closely with Prime Intellect. They not only served the H100 clusters Datology used to generate synthetic data, they have been deeply involved in helping scale our training setup to the GPU footprint required for a fully frontier sized model, including the current 2048 B300 GPU configuration for Trinity Large."
